creator: adam@electricembers.net
text:
We are also seeing this behavior when Apache is installed from source, 
but *not* when it's been installed from ports, if that helps find the 
root cause.

The fix submitted on this bug report will indeed do the trick, but if 
I'm not mistaken it may be more generalized than would be ideal -- ie. 
not actually targeting the specific place where this source/ports 
difference with Apache comes into play, if that matters.  Sorry to say, 
it's beyond me to actually track down the gremlin.

HTH.
       adam
